name: Meshakwad Community Center
description: Come play pickleball at Meshakwad Community Center in Hinckley, MN! There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms and water. A membership is required to play.

name: Pine City Elementary School
description: Community Ed focuses on adult players only please.  Interested players should check out the Pine City Community Ed website.  Informal instruction provide by Pine City Area Pickleball volunteers.  Current playing opportunities are listed in PlayTime Scheduler.  Select: USA, MN, Pine City Area.
fees: Fee required — May register online with Pine City Community Ed or pay $5.00 fee at the door
